title: Syracuse Salt Company and SU team up to launch orange-inspired ‘Cuse Flake Salts
summary: Syracuse Salt Company has partnered with Syracuse University to develop and launch 'Cuse Flake Salts, a consumer product line inspired by the university's orange branding. This business-community collaboration represents a local economic development initiative combining institutional partnership with private sector innovation.

political_signal.description: Local private-public partnership demonstrating alignment with economic development and business community engagement priorities; promotes local entrepreneurship and institutional collaboration.
